content.text:
cat > /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4 << 'G4EOF'
[?2004l[?2004hparser grammar SYsUParser;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hoptions {
[?2004l[?2004h  tokenVocab=SYsULexer;
[?2004l[?2004h}
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004h// Entry point
[?2004l[?2004hcompilationUnit
[?2004l[?2004h    :   translationUnit? EOF
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004htranslationUnit
[?2004l[?2004h    :   externalDeclaration+
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hexternalDeclaration
[?2004l[?2004h    :   functionDefinition
[?2004l[?2004h    |   declaration
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004h// Function definition
[?2004l[?2004hfunctionDefinition
[?2004l[?2004h    :   declarationSpecifiers directDeclarator '(' parameterTypeList? ')' compoundStatement
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004h// Declarations
[?2004l[?2004hdeclaration
[?2004l[?2004h    :   declarationSpecifiers initDeclaratorList? ';'
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hdeclarationSpecifiers
[?2004l[?2004h    :   declarationSpecifier+
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hdeclarationSpecifier
[?2004l[?2004h    :   typeSpecifier
[?2004l[?2004h    |   typeQualifier
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004htypeSpecifier
[?2004l[?2004h    :   'int'
[?2004l[?2004h    |   'void'
[?2004l[?2004h    |   'const'
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004htypeQualifier
[?2004l[?2004h    :   'const'
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hinitDeclaratorList
[?2004l[?2004h    :   initDeclarator (',' initDeclarator)*
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hinitDeclarator
[?2004l[?2004h    :   declarator ('=' initializer)?
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hdeclarator
[?2004l[?2004h    :   directDeclarator
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hdirectDeclarator
[?2004l[?2004h    :   Identifier
[?2004l[?2004h    |   directDeclarator '[' assignmentExpression? ']'
[?2004l[?2004h    |   directDeclarator '(' parameterTypeList? ')'
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hparameterTypeList
[?2004l[?2004h    :   parameterList (',' '...')?
[?2004l[?2004h    |   'void'
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hparameterList
[?2004l[?2004h    :   parameterDeclaration (',' parameterDeclaration)*
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hparameterDeclaration
[?2004l[?2004h    :   declarationSpecifiers declarator
[?2004l[?2004h    |   declarationSpecifiers abstractDeclarator?
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004habstractDeclarator
[?2004l[?2004h    :   directAbstractDeclarator
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hdirectAbstractDeclarator
[?2004l[?2004h    :   '[' assignmentExpression? ']'
[?2004l[?2004h    |   directAbstractDeclarator '[' assignmentExpression? ']'
[?2004l[?2004h    |   '(' ')'
[?2004l[?2004h    |   '(' directAbstractDeclarator ')'
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hinitializer
[?2004l[?2004h    :   assignmentExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    |   '{' initializerList ','? '}'
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hinitializerList
[?2004l[?2004h    :   designation? initializer (',' designation? initializer)*
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hdesignation
[?2004l[?2004h    :   designatorList '='
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hdesignatorList
[?2004l[?2004h    :   designator+
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hdesignator
[?2004l[?2004h    :   '[' constantExpression ']'
[?2004l[?2004h    |   '.' Identifier
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004h// Statements
[?2004l[?2004hstatement
[?2004l[?2004h    :   compoundStatement
[?2004l[?2004h    |   expressionStatement
[?2004l[?2004h    |   selectionStatement
[?2004l[?2004h    |   iterationStatement
[?2004l[?2004h    |   jumpStatement
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hcompoundStatement
[?2004l[?2004h    :   '{' blockItemList? '}'
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hblockItemList
[?2004l[?2004h    :   blockItem+
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hblockItem
[?2004l[?2004h    :   statement
[?2004l[?2004h    |   declaration
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hexpressionStatement
[?2004l[?2004h    :   expression? ';'
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hselectionStatement
[?2004l[?2004h    :   'if' '(' expression ')' statement ('else' statement)?
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hiterationStatement
[?2004l[?2004h    :   'while' '(' expression ')' statement
[?2004l[?2004h    |   'for' '(' expression? ';' expression? ';' expression? ')' statement
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hjumpStatement
[?2004l[?2004h    :   'return' expression? ';'
[?2004l[?2004h    |   'break' ';'
[?2004l[?2004h    |   'continue' ';'
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004h// Expressions (precedence from lowest to highest)
[?2004l[?2004hexpression
[?2004l[?2004h    :   assignmentExpression (',' assignmentExpression)*
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hassignmentExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    :   conditionalExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    |   unaryExpression assignmentOperator assignmentExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hassignmentOperator
[?2004l[?2004h    :   '=' | '+=' | '-=' | '*=' | '/=' | '%=' 
[?2004l[?2004h    |   '&=' | '|=' | '^=' | '<<=' | '>>='
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hconditionalExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    :   logicalOrExpression ('?' expression ':' conditionalExpression)?
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hlogicalOrExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    :   logicalAndExpression ('||' logicalAndExpression)*
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hlogicalAndExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    :   inclusiveOrExpression ('&&' inclusiveOrExpression)*
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hinclusiveOrExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    :   exclusiveOrExpression ('|' exclusiveOrExpression)*
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hexclusiveOrExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    :   andExpression ('^' andExpression)*
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004handExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    :   equalityExpression ('&' equalityExpression)*
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hequalityExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    :   relationalExpression (('==' | '!=') relationalExpression)*
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hrelationalExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    :   shiftExpression (('<' | '>' | '<=' | '>=') shiftExpression)*
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hshiftExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    :   additiveExpression (('<<' | '>>') additiveExpression)*
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hadditiveExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    :   multiplicativeExpression (('+' | '-') multiplicativeExpression)*
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hmultiplicativeExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    :   castExpression (('*' | '/' | '%') castExpression)*
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hcastExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    :   '(' typeName ')' castExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    |   unaryExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004htypeName
[?2004l[?2004h    :   typeSpecifier abstractDeclarator?
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hunaryExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    :   postfixExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    |   unaryOperator unaryExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    |   'sizeof' unaryExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    |   'sizeof' '(' typeName ')'
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hunaryOperator
[?2004l[?2004h    :   '+' | '-' | '!' | '~'
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hpostfixExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    :   primaryExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    |   postfixExpression '[' expression ']'
[?2004l[?2004h    |   postfixExpression '(' argumentExpressionList? ')'
[?2004l[?2004h    |   postfixExpression '.' Identifier
[?2004l[?2004h    |   postfixExpression '->' Identifier
[?2004l[?2004h    |   postfixExpression '++'
[?2004l[?2004h    |   postfixExpression '--'
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hprimaryExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    :   Identifier
[?2004l[?2004h    |   Constant
[?2004l[?2004h    |   '(' expression ')'
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hargumentExpressionList
[?2004l[?2004h    :   assignmentExpression (',' assignmentExpression)*
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004h// Constants and operators (for reference in actions)
[?2004l[?2004hConstant
[?2004l[?2004h    :   IntegerConstant
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hIntegerConstant
[?2004l[?2004h    :   DecimalConstant
[?2004l[?2004h    |   OctalConstant
[?2004l[?2004h    |   HexadecimalConstant
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hDecimalConstant
[?2004l[?2004h    :   NonzeroDigit Digit*
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hOctalConstant
[?2004l[?2004h    :   '0' OctalDigit*
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hHexadecimalConstant
[?2004l[?2004h    :   '0' [xX] HexDigit+
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hHexDigit
[?2004l[?2004h    :   [0-9a-fA-F]
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hNonzeroDigit
[?2004l[?2004h    :   [1-9]
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hDigit
[?2004l[?2004h    :   [0-9]
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hOctalDigit
[?2004l[?2004h    :   [0-7]
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hIdentifier
[?2004l[?2004h    :   IdentifierNondigit (IdentifierNondigit | Digit)*
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hIdentifierNondigit
[?2004l[?2004h    :   Nondigit
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hNondigit
[?2004l[?2004h    :   [a-zA-Z_]
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004hG4EOF
[?2004l[?2004h
